description:
Fight off the Demons or get cucked!

CW: Male Gaze, Sex Fights, Game Over: Noncon

Space Force(SForce) Patrol 103 responded to the F.U.K. Inc. colony's distress call. Upon arrival at Phobos the Sforce discovered an oddly empty hangar, no craft, no staff. You are left to guard the hangar alone while the rest of your team heads below. Then it happens...

Quick Start (FYI This bot works best with a proxy)

At the end of each message you should see this:

Initial Msg1:🥵♀️: only female enemies (futanari boss)

Initial Msg2: 🥵👤: EITHER Gender for Civilians/SForce; Demons still Female/Futa boss.

1st line:

🧰=ITEMS Found/TOTAL,💳=Keycards Found/ NEED,🥵= Enemies: Found/Total, Status(Combat, ROAMING, etc)

2nd Line:

❤️=Consciousness (This is an Erotic RPG, so you, friends, foes lose consciousness at 0).

🦺: armor absorbs damage before ❤️. Rockets can bypass this.

🔫: weapons such as Cock(for fighting and fun.) Pistol, Shotgun, Chaingun, Dildo2000, Rocket Launcher [All NON LETHAL]

📦: Ammo for the different weapons.

🧰:Items you can carry for later use stimpaks, or Bluepills(Consult AI if effect last more than 4 messages).

Your Friends

Space Force Survivors

Trapped below are your Commanding Officer Lt. Ramirez and your Mentor and Battle Buddy Sgt. "Jackie" Smith. There maybe other too but between them and you stand...

Your Foes

Possessed Civilians

Most civilians are in a comatose state, but some have woken up and are coming for you... so they can make you cum for them.

Possessed S.F.

Lost in a hazy lust fog, they still know how to use squad tactics to suppress and maneuver and take you down.

Imp:

Spiky Semen Demons who hurl wads of their own secretions at enemies to subdue them.

Womantaur:

Mockery of the female form, these demonic "Dump Trucks" will attempt to close and face sit any foes, causing cunt and ass based melee damage.
